title: Central University of Odisha Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Central University of Odisha Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Central University of Odisha Exam Result 2026 Out for B.Tech Dairy Technology, B.Sc Agriculture and B.Sc Forestry semester exams on the official website - cuo.ac.in. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the CUO Result 2026.

content.text: Central University of Odisha (CUO), Koraput has officially declared the Central University of Odisha Exam Result 2026 for various UG professional programmes under the School of Integrated Agriculture and Natural Resources. The latest result update includes semester-wise results for B.Tech in Dairy Technology, B.Sc (Hons) Agriculture and B.Sc (Hons) Forestry for the academic sessions 2023-24, 2024-25 and 2025-26, covering Monsoon (1st, 3rd, 5th Semester) and Winter (2nd, 4th Semester) sessions. Central University of Odisha Exam Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - cuo.ac.in.

Students can check and download their CUO UG semester results by visiting the university’s Academic Results page and opening the course-wise PDF result links provided for each session and semester combination. The result PDFs carry student details, enrollment numbers, grade points and semester performance, and are accessible directly without login, while the website may also host other UG/PG result links for reference. After viewing the result, students should carefully verify their name, enrollment number, semester, course and grade details, and in case of any discrepancy, they should promptly contact the Central University of Odisha examination branch or their department for necessary corrections.

sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Central University of Odisha has published a comprehensive set of results for its professional UG programmes in Dairy Technology, Agriculture and Forestry as part of CUO Results 2026. The results span across three academic sessions (2023-24, 2024-25 and 2025-26) and multiple semesters (1st to 5th), providing students with an updated view of their performance in Monsoon and Winter sessions. All these results have been uploaded in PDF format on the official Academic Results page, enabling students to directly download and review their semester-wise marks and grades.

sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: CUO has activated all relevant result PDFs for B.Tech in Dairy Technology, B.Sc (Hons) Agriculture and B.Sc (Hons) Forestry under the Academic Results section, where semester-wise results are organised by programme and session. Students can access each semester’s result for the 2023-24, 2024-25 and 2025-26 sessions using the direct links below and download the PDFs for their records. The table summarises all available Central University of Odisha Exam Result 2026 links for quick reference.

sections.heading: How to Check Central University of Odisha Exam Result 2026

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download your CUO Exam Result 2026 for B.Tech Dairy Technology, B.Sc (Hons) Agriculture and B.Sc (Hons) Forestry.

items: Visit the official Central University of Odisha website: cuo.ac.in.
Navigate to the 'Academic' or 'Examination' section and click on 'Results', or directly open the Academic Results page at https://cuo.ac.in/Academic_Results.asp?pgid=4&subid=4.

On the Academic Results page, look for the section listing results for the School of Integrated Agriculture and Natural Resources, including B.Tech in Dairy Technology, B.Sc (Hons) Agriculture and B.Sc (Hons) Forestry.
Identify the correct academic session (2023-24, 2024-25 or 2025-26) and semester (1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th or 5th, Monsoon/Winter) for your programme.
Click on the corresponding PDF link such as 'B.Tech in Dairy Technology 2nd Semester Result (Winter Session) 2024-25' to open the result sheet.
In the PDF, check your name, enrollment number, grade points and result status, then download or print the file for future academic reference and contact the university if any discrepancy is found.
